no_changes_rationale:
Bead ddx-27586b57: no changes required.

Status: complete — PRD updates already on disk and on main.

What is done:
- docs/helix/01-frame/prd.md already contains every change the bead specifies.
  Verified at base-rev 0a7bc065 (this worktree's HEAD):
  - Summary updated (multi-media; three-layer run architecture; one substrate).
  - Feature blurbs updated for FEAT-001, 005, 006, 007, 008, 010, 019, 021.
  - Problem section restructured into 6 thesis-keyed clusters:
    Abstraction, Iteration over tracked work, Methodology plurality,
    LLM physics (new), Evidence and provenance, Human-AI collaboration.
  - Primary Goals: #1 reworded ("Manage multi-media artifact libraries"),
    #13 three-layer architecture, #14 source-hash-driven regeneration,
    #15 100% read coverage on HTTP/MCP.
  - Non-goals: sharpened loop wording (mechanical drain in scope; supervisory
    content-aware decisions out) and added "Cataloging run types beyond the
    three layers" non-goal.
- docs/helix/01-frame/principles.md was not touched (per bead instruction).

Why no commit:
- The required content was committed in bebb231b ("docs(prd): update prd.md
  for artifact + 3-layer run architecture [ddx-27586b57]") on main on
  2026-04-29 and is included in this worktree's checkpoint base-rev
  0a7bc065. `git diff base-rev HEAD -- docs/helix/01-frame/prd.md` is empty.
- A prior re-run of this bead (the one whose REVIEW:BLOCK note appears in
  the current bead) committed only execution evidence; the underlying file
  was — and is — already correct. There is nothing meaningful to add.

What a follow-up would need:
- Nothing. The bead's acceptance is satisfied by the current state of
  docs/helix/01-frame/prd.md. If the reviewer disagrees with any specific
  bullet, name the bullet and I'll edit precisely that line.
